# Project Structure Diagram

This folder contains a Mermaid architecture diagram for the project.

## Files

- `architecture.mmd`: main architecture diagram in Mermaid format.
- `architecture-high-level.mmd`: simplified high-level architecture view for executive documentation.

## Usage

1. Open `architecture.mmd` in VS Code with Mermaid preview support.
2. Or paste its contents into https://mermaid.live.

## Notes

- The diagram uses parser-safe labels (quoted subgraph titles) to avoid syntax issues across Mermaid renderers.
- Scope covered: infrastructure, routes/middleware, app core, presentation, i18n, and testing/quality.
